app.title: JSON l10n Diff Tool
app.subtitle: Side-by-side JSON comparison with unified tree view

upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop a JSON file here, or click to select
upload.maxSize: File size must be less than {size} MB

comparison.emptyState: Upload two JSON files to compare

instructions.title: Features:
instructions.step1: Uses File 1's keys as the primary structure
instructions.step2: Shows values from both files for each key
instructions.step3c: Light blue = Missing in File 1 (temporary keys)
instructions.step4: Click "+ Add" button to add missing keys to either file
instructions.step5: Keys that exist in File 2 but not in File 1 are shown with "(temp)" badge
instructions.step6: Click arrows to expand/collapse nested objects
instructions.step7: Buttons at the top for bulk operations

about.title: About JSON l10n Diff Tool
about.subtitle: Privacy-first localization comparison tool
about.description: A powerful tool for comparing and analyzing differences between JSON localization files.
about.author: Author

uploadCompare.title: Upload & Compare
uploadCompare.description: Drag-and-drop or select two JSON localization files to compare instantly

visualTree.title: Visual Tree Structure
visualTree.description: View nested key hierarchy with expandable/collapsible nodes

smartDiff.title: Smart Diff Highlighting
smartDiff.description: Color-coded differences: red for missing keys, yellow for identical values, green for different values

inlineEditing.title: Inline Editing
inlineEditing.description: Edit translations directly in the comparison view

addMissingKeys.title: Add Missing Keys
addMissingKeys.description: One-click to add missing keys to either file

saveDownload.title: Save & Download
saveDownload.description: Export modified files with all your changes

upload.title: Upload
upload.description: Drag and drop or select your JSON localization files

parse.title: Parse
parse.description: Files are validated and structured into a nested tree

compare.title: Compare
compare.description: Differences are calculated and highlighted with color coding

edit.title: Edit
edit.description: Make changes directly in the interface

steps.highlight: All processing happens in your browser-fast, secure, and private.

clientSide.title: 100% Client-Side Processing
clientSide.description: All file processing happens entirely in your browser

noServerUploads.title: No Server Uploads
noServerUploads.description: Your files never leave your computer

noTracking.title: No Tracking
noTracking.description: We don't collect or store your data

missingTranslations.title: Finding Missing Translations
missingTranslations.description: You've added new features to your app and need to ensure all languages are up to date.
missingTranslations.exampleLines:
✅ Upload en.json (your main language file)
✅ Upload fr.json (French translations)
🔴 Missing keys highlighted instantly
➕ Add missing keys with one click
💾 Save updated fr.json

untranslatedPlaceholders.title: Catching Untranslated Placeholders
untranslatedPlaceholders.description: Sometimes placeholder text gets copied instead of translated.

teamSynchronization.title: Team Synchronization
teamSynchronization.description: Multiple team members working on translations? Keep files in sync.
teamSynchronization.exampleLines:
✅ Compare your local changes against the main branch
🔴 See what others added that you're missing
➕ Add new keys to your file
💾 Export and commit synchronized files

editControls.resetAriaLabel: Discard all changes and restore original file

actions.addKeyToFile1: Add key "{keyPath}" to File 1 with value: {value}
actions.addKeyToFile2: Add key "{keyPath}" to File 2 with value: {value}

errors.bothFilesRequired: Both files must be loaded before running comparison

prettifyWarning.title: Prettify JSON
prettifyWarning.message: Prettification may cause extra git diff noise. The file will be reformatted with 2-space indentation.

tierGate.placeholder: TierGate placeholder - to be implemented in Phase 6
